     the Fermi energy is    -0.3502 ev

!    total energy              =  -10339.97839432 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          1.5E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.14940002 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -10339.82899431 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -221507.77159758 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  111782.28379379 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4254.87394228 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  103642.51985345 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.98710169 Ry

     total magnetization       =    90.06 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    96.19 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  36 iterations

     negative rho (up, down):  4.144E-03 3.872E-03
